item.title: PLA Navy conducts exercises near Taiwan Strait
item.author: wire@example.test (Wire)
item.description: Naval exercises reported in the Taiwan Strait today.

item.title: CENTCOM announces Red Sea interdiction
item.description: U.S. Fifth Fleet announces vessel interdiction in the Red Sea.

item.title: Duplicate of first item
item.description: Same URL as first item; should be skipped.
